final:
module top_module(
    input [1:0] data_in,
    input sel,
    output data_out
);assign data_out = (sel == 1'b0) ? data_in[0] : data_in[1];

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      data_out <= ~data_in[0];
      if (sel) begin
        data_out <= ~data_in[1];
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
